descriptionHtml:
Lagoon 50 For Sale 2022 | 6 Guest Cabins + 1 Crew Cabin | Tax Not Paid

If you’re seeking a spacious and versatile catamaran suitable for family cruising or charter operations, the Lagoon 50 For Sale 2022 offers a comfortable layout and modern equipment. She is in good condition, maintained properly, and will be available for sale at the end of the 2025 season. This model stands out with her balance between space, functionality and performance on the water.

Specifications:

  • Build Year: 2022
  • Cabins: 6 cabins + 1 upper/lower bow cabin
  • Heads (WC): 4 + 1
  • Registered Onboard Capacity: 12 persons
  • Length Over All (LOA): 14.75 metres
  • Beam: 8.1 metres
  • Draft: 1.4 metres
  • Fuel Tanks: 2
  • Water Tank Capacity: 800 litres
  • Engines: 2 x 80 HP Yanmar 4JH80 (approximately 400 hours)
  • Generator: Yes
  • Watermaker: Yes
  • Plotter: Yes
  • GPS: Yes
  • Bimini: Yes
  • Deck Shower: Yes
  • Electric Fridge: Yes
  • Air Conditioning: Yes
  • Hydraulic Winches: Yes
  • Electric Winch: Yes
  • Electric Toilets: Yes
  • Cabin Fans: Yes
  • Inverter: Yes

Carefully maintained and kept in good condition, she is ready to continue offering enjoyable cruising to her next owner. The Lagoon 50 For Sale 2022 represents an attractive option for those who value space, comfort and reliable systems in a catamaran.
